data.title: MongoDB Shares Climb After Blockbuster Q3 Results, FY25 Guidance Above Estimates
data.description: MongoDB reported its third-quarter results after Monday's closing bell. Here's a look at the key figures from the quarter.

data.title: Murdoch Succession Plan Faces Setback As Commissioner Rejects Eldest Son's Control
data.description: Rupert Murdoch's attempt to favor his eldest son Lachlan in a trust fund shuffle hit a roadblock when Commissioner Edmund J. Gorman Jr. ruled against it.

data.title: States Without Legal Cannabis Are Missing Out On Billions In Annual Tax Revenue, New Analysis Shows
data.description: Cannabis tax revenue is transforming state economies, with over $19 billion raised so far. States like California and Colorado direct cannabis tax revenue to education.
